zh.lifeSummary: 當Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence於1338年11月29日出生在比利時安特維爾時，他的父親Edward III King of England26歲，母親Philippa de Hainault Queen of England25歲。他於1352年8月15日與Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster在英國米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1368年10月17日在義大利皮蒙特辛艾巴享年29歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可克萊爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence于1338年11月29日出生在比利时安特維爾时，他的父亲Edward III King of England26岁，母亲Philippa de Hainault Queen of England25岁。他于1352年8月15日与Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster在英国米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1368年10月17日在意大利皮蒙特辛艾巴享年29岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可克萊爾。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Lionel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval diminutive of the Old French name Léon ( see Leo ) or the Middle English nickname Lion.

en.lifeSummary: When Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence was born on 29 November 1338, in Antwerp, Belgium, his father, Edward III King of England, was 26 and his mother, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, was 25. He married Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster on 15 August 1352, in Tower of London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 17 October 1368, in Alba, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy, at the age of 29, and was buried in Clare, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence est né le 29 novembre 1338, à Anvers, Belgique, son père, Edward III King of England, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster le 15 août 1352, à Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1368, à Alba, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Clare, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: York Minster, York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence am 29. November 1338 in Antwerpen, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward III King of England 26 und seine Mutter Philippa de Hainault Queen of England 25. Er hat am 15. August 1352 in Tower of London, Middlesex, England Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1368 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Alba, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien und wurde in Clare, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence è nato il il 29 novembre 1338 nel Anversa, Belgio, il suo padre, Edward III King of England, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster il 15 agosto 1352, nel Tower of London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 17 ottobre 1368, nel Alba, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Clare, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarenceが1338年11月29日にベルギーアントウエルペンで生まれた時，父Edward III King of Englandは26歳，母Philippa de Hainault Queen of Englandは25歳であった。1352年8月15日にイギリスミッドレセックストウエル オフ ロンドンでElizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1368年10月17日にイタリアピエモントクウネオアルバで29歳で死去し，イギリススフォルククラーにて埋葬された。

ko.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크 요르크 민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence(이)가 1338년 11월 29일 벨기에 앤트워펜에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward III King of England(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa de Hainault Queen of England(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1352년 8월 15일 영국 미들레세스 타워 프 런던에서 Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1368년 10월 17일 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 알바에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 클래르에 묻혔다.

pt.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: York Minster, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence nasceu em 29 de novembro de 1338, em Antuérpia, Bélgica, seu pai, Edward III King of England, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster em 15 de agosto de 1352, em Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1368, em Alba, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Clare, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: ерк минстир, ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence родился 29 ноября 1338 г. в местности антвирпен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Edward III King of England было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster 15 августа 1352 г. в местности тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 17 октября 1368 г. в местности алба, кунео, пиемонт, Италия в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности клар, суффолк, Англия.

es.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: York Minster, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence nació el 29 de noviembre de 1338, en Amberes, Bélgica, su papá, Edward III King of England, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster el 15 de agosto de 1352, en Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1368, en Alba, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Clare, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
